violations.description: Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Pork in warmer found at 125F, pork just shredded found in hot hold at 115F-120F. Brisket in left warmer found at 130, 135 and 141F.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Hot hold units found with food temps of 126F to 132F.* Units set to 135F were turned up while on-site.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Make table at ~53F. *Ensure unit is turned/cooling on prior to use and maintains food at 41F or less.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
